monster.name: Zikle
monster.description: In life, Zikle was a goblin wizard of extraordinary power — small in stature but immense in intellect and ambition. As a wraith, he appears as a translucent greenish shadow with still-recognizable goblinoid features: pointed ears, sunken eyes that glow with a cold spectral light, skeletal hands that move as if still tracing arcane formulas in the air. His voice is a hoarse, metallic whisper, interrupted by sudden bursts of rage. He alternates between moments of brilliant lucidity and blind fury — the betrayal that killed him still consumes him. Role: secondary
